allow: Bash(python -c "import os, configparser; c = configparser.ConfigParser\(\); c.read\('config.ini', encoding='utf-8'\); raw = c['HARDWARE']['lto_drive']; print\('raw repr  :', repr\(raw\)\); print\('raw len   :', len\(raw\)\); norm = os.path.normpath\(os.path.expandvars\(os.path.expanduser\(raw\)\)\); print\('norm repr :', repr\(norm\)\); print\('join test :', repr\(os.path.join\(norm, 'staging_basename'\)\)\); print\('rstrip eje:', repr\(norm.rstrip\(':\\\\\\\\'\)\)\); print\('rstrip fmt:', repr\(norm.rstrip\(':\\\\\\\\/'\)\)\)")
PowerShell($cmds = 'python3','python','py'; foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } })
PowerShell(python -c "import lto_archive_manager as m; p = m.generate_backup_summary\('backup_logs'\); print\('WROTE:', p\)")
